visualizerParams.title: AND Gate Multi-Input Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The multi-input AND gate is intended to return 1 ONLY if ALL inputs are 1. However, it seems to be returning 1 in some incorrect cases. Find and fix the error in the logic gate implementation.

solution.explanation: The buggy code incorrectly used the `any()` function, which implements an OR gate (returns 1 if AT LEAST one input is 1). For an AND gate, we must use the `all()` function, which returns True only if ALL elements in the list are truthy.
